name: ADDvise Group AB (publ)
summary: ADDvise Group AB (publ) develops and supplies equipment and services to healthcare and research facilities in private and public sectors in Sweden, rest of Europe, North America, and Asia. The company's Lab business unit offers laboratory furnishings, safety ventilation products, climate rooms, clean rooms, and laboratory apparatus. Its Healthcare business unit develops, manufactures, and markets vacuum mattresses, pillows and splints, and vacuum products, as well as equipment for pilots, such as flight suits and Anti-G suits; healthcare equipment, such as bags and carrying systems, as well as equipment and consumable materials, such as intra-osseous and biopsy needles; equipment for patient positioning, primarily within urology and gynecology areas; and surgical tables for medical care. The company was formerly known as ADDvise Lab Solutions AB (publ) and changed its name to ADDvise Group AB (publ) in September 2015. ADDvise Group AB (publ) was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
